findings.problem: `Code shape and semantic surface` scored 0 below the standard floor of 85
findings.agent_fix: split large or ambiguous authored code into smaller semantic modules with focused tests

findings.problem: workflow job is missing timeout-minutes
findings.agent_fix: set an explicit timeout-minutes on each job
findings.reason: workflow can run without a checked time bound

findings.problem: workflow uses an external action not pinned to a full commit SHA
findings.agent_fix: pin every external action to a 40-character commit SHA
findings.reason: tag or branch refs can change without review
